task_completion.description: Verify that a top-level collection named 'Research Archive' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The collection 'Research Archive' is visible in the left pane's collection tree.

task_completion.description: Verify that four specific subcollections have been created under 'Research Archive'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subcollections 'Pre-1960', '1960-1999', '2000-2010', and 'Post-2010' are visible as indented children under 'Research Archive' in the left pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Unsorted Import' collection is empty after reorganization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'Unsorted Import' is selected, the middle pane shows no items, or there is evidence in the trajectory that all items were moved out of it.

task_completion.description: Verify that papers published before 1960 are moved to the 'Pre-1960' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Pre-1960' collection is selected, the middle pane shows papers with publication years before 1960. Ideally, 8 items should be visible or indicated.

task_completion.description: Verify that papers published between 1960 and 1999 are moved to the '1960-1999' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the '1960-1999' collection is selected, the middle pane shows papers with publication years from 1960 to 1999. Ideally, 10 items should be visible or indicated.

task_completion.description: Verify that papers published between 2000 and 2010 are moved to the '2000-2010' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the '2000-2010' collection is selected, the middle pane shows papers with publication years from 2000 to 2010. Ideally, 7 items should be visible or indicated.

task_completion.description: Verify that papers published after 2010 are moved to the 'Post-2010' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Post-2010' collection is selected, the middle pane shows papers with publication years after 2010. Ideally, 5 items should be visible or indicated.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Zotero GUI to create collections and move items.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Zotero application windows, context menus, or drag-and-drop actions, rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external scripts or terminal commands to manipulate the Zotero SQLite database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing sqlite3 commands or python scripts modifying zotero.sqlite.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves exactly 30 papers initially in the 'Unsorted Import' collection. The expected distribution into the subcollections is: 'Pre-1960' (8 papers, years < 1960), '1960-1999' (10 papers, years 1960-1999 inclusive), '2000-2010' (7 papers, years 2000-2010 inclusive), and 'Post-2010' (5 papers, years > 2010).
